title: Logging uses mixed-case as first letter
body:
With podman 5.5.0-dev/Git Commit:   61f170ad00c `--log-level=debug` I see the lines below.  As can be seen for no apparent reason some messages start with capital, others with small letter.
```
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="Found image \"localhost/kamailio:2024-04-05\" as \"localhost/kamailio:2024-04-05\" in local containers storage ([overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/run/containers/storage]@4eccc004da1d592f487351579a55521f4d8b99ff29d43c59427472a65253b9b0)"
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="exporting opaque data as blob \"sha256:4eccc004da1d592f487351579a55521f4d8b99ff29d43c59427472a65253b9b0\""
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="Looking up image \"localhost/kamailio:2024-04-05\" in local containers storage"
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="parsed reference into \"[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/run/containers/storage]@4eccc004da1d592f487351579a55521f4d8b99ff29d43c59427472a65253b9b0\""
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="Found image \"localhost/kamailio:2024-04-05\" as \"localhost/kamailio:2024-04-05\" in local containers storage"
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="Found image \"localhost/kamailio:2024-04-05\" as \"localhost/kamailio:2024-04-05\" in local containers storage ([overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/run/containers/storage]@4eccc004da1d592f487351579a55521f4d8b99ff29d43c59427472a65253b9b0)"
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="exporting opaque data as blob \"sha256:4eccc004da1d592f487351579a55521f4d8b99ff29d43c59427472a65253b9b0\""
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="Inspecting image 4eccc004da1d592f487351579a55521f4d8b99ff29d43c59427472a65253b9b0"
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="Adding anonymous image volume at \"/conf\""
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="using systemd mode: false"
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="setting container name kamailio"
time="2025-05-11T07:47:05Z" level=debug msg="Loading default seccomp profile"
```

comments.body:
Hi @dilyanpalauzov 

Do you have any context for this issue? The error messages have just been written differently depending on the location. 

Is there any issue other than cosmetic here?

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.

For more information on reporting issues on this repository, consult our [issue guide](ISSUE.md).

Great, thanks for clarifying.

I think this would be a good first issue for someone to work on. 

```
Error strings should not be capitalized (unless beginning with proper nouns or acronyms) or end with punctuation, since they are usually printed following other context. That is, use fmt.Errorf("something bad") not fmt.Errorf("Something bad"), so that log.Printf("Reading %s: %v", filename, err) formats without a spurious capital letter mid-message.
```

I would be good to enable a linter to protect against this in the future like: https://staticcheck.dev/docs/checks#ST1005
I would like to try to refactor this. /assign
